T0179.title: Basic Identity File
T0179.definition: In illicit data trading, a basic personal profile record that includes a close-up ID photo, full name, national ID number (two-factor elements), and detailed residential address.
T0179.description: In illicit data trading, this refers to a foundational personal dossier containing a headshot-style ID photo, the individual’s name and ID number (the two core verification elements), along with their full residential address.
T0179.usageExample: “Individual household records, front and back of ID, guaranteed before 6 PM.”
